examples: Attempting to resolve this contradiction, Harris concludes that Fern employed flowery rhetoric strategically to disguise her subversive goals beneath apparent conventionality.
They have a great contempt for conventionality.
To many people conventionality is indistinguishable from conservatism.
In the marketplace of arena rock, that measure of conventionality was a strength, not a limitation.
By now it is so established that it is reducible to jokes that depend entirely on the conventionality of conventional wisdom.
